title: Foundations of Probability Theory & Random Variables
description: A hierarchical flowchart showing the progression from basic probability concepts to the definition and classification of random variables.
relationships: Probability Axioms assign a measure P(E) to Events
A Random Variable is a function mapping S to real numbers
Random Variables are classified as Discrete or Continuous
Discrete RVs are described by a PMF
Continuous RVs are described by a PDF
Both types share a common CDF definition
